creator: alexanderchuranov@gmail.com
text:
Link to patch specified in ports/129226 is broken. It seems the website that hosts file is unstable. The same file was uploaded to 3 other sites:


devel-boost-from-1.34.1-to-1.37.diff.txt :

http://www.flyupload.com/?fid=712178626
http://www.gigasize.com/get.php?d=gdgsc7nnr8c
http://rapidshare.com/files/168020620/devel-boost-from-1.34.1-to-1.37.diff.txt.html


Additionally, full new port tarball was uploaded.
boost-port-1_37_0.tar.bz2:

http://www.flyupload.com/?fid=769359286
http://www.gigasize.com/get.php?d=1tfgzpy08nb
http://rapidshare.com/files/168021718/boost-port-1_37_0.tar.bz2.html

Fix: 

Download from one of new locations.
Rapidshare promised to keep the file for 90 days.
How-To-Repeat: Try do download file from specified location at driveway.com
